datasets.name: ds_uc_overview
queryLines: SELECT table_type, COUNT(*) as asset_count FROM system.information_schema.tables WHERE table_catalog NOT IN ('system','samples') GROUP BY table_type ORDER BY asset_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_uc_tags
queryLines: SELECT tag_name, COUNT(DISTINCT concat(catalog_name,'.',schema_name,'.',table_name)) as tagged_tables FROM system.information_schema.table_tags WHERE catalog_name NOT IN ('system','samples') GROUP BY tag_name ORDER BY tagged_tables DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_uc_access
queryLines: SELECT privilege_type, COUNT(*) as grant_count, COUNT(DISTINCT grantee) as distinct_grantees FROM system.information_schema.table_privileges WHERE table_catalog NOT IN ('system','samples') GROUP BY privilege_type ORDER BY grant_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_uc_undocumented
queryLines: SELECT t.table_catalog, t.table_schema, t.table_name, t.table_owner, t.table_type FROM system.information_schema.tables t LEFT JOIN system.information_schema.table_tags tt ON t.table_catalog = tt.catalog_name AND t.table_schema = tt.schema_name AND t.table_name = tt.table_name WHERE t.table_catalog NOT IN ('system','samples') AND tt.tag_name IS NULL AND (t.comment IS NULL OR t.comment = '') ORDER BY t.table_catalog, t.table_schema LIMIT 30

datasets.name: ds_uc_tables_by_catalog
queryLines: SELECT table_catalog, COUNT(*) as table_count FROM system.information_schema.tables WHERE table_catalog NOT IN ('system','samples') GROUP BY table_catalog ORDER BY table_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_wd_counters
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_open, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as critical_open, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_open, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_id) as resources_violated FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations WHERE status='open'

datasets.name: ds_wd_resources
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT resource_id) as total_resources, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) as resource_types FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory WHERE scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory)

datasets.name: ds_wd_domain
queryLines: SELECT domain, COUNT(*) as violation_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations WHERE status='open' GROUP BY domain ORDER BY violation_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_wd_domain_sev
queryLines: SELECT domain, severity, COUNT(*) as violation_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations WHERE status='open' GROUP BY domain, severity

datasets.name: ds_wd_owners
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(owner,''), 'Unassigned') as owner, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as critical, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low, COUNT(DISTINCT policy_id) as policies_violated FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations WHERE status='open' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(owner,''), 'Unassigned') ORDER BY critical DESC, high DESC, total DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_wd_top_policies
queryLines: SELECT v.policy_id, v.severity, v.domain, COUNT(*) as violation_count, COUNT(DISTINCT v.resource_id) as resource_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v WHERE v.status='open' GROUP BY v.policy_id, v.severity, v.domain ORDER BY violation_count DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_wd_ontology
queryLines: SELECT class_name, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_id) as resource_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_classifications WHERE scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_classifications) GROUP BY class_name ORDER BY resource_count DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_wd_access_gov
queryLines: SELECT policy_id, COUNT(*) as violation_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations WHERE status='open' AND policy_id LIKE 'POL-A%' GROUP BY policy_id ORDER BY violation_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_wd_access_counters
queryLines: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN policy_id='POL-A002' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direct_user_grants, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_id='POL-A001' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overprivileged FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations WHERE status='open' AND policy_id LIKE 'POL-A%'

datasets.name: ds_wd_grants_detail
queryLines: SELECT ri.metadata['grantee'] as grantee, ri.metadata['privilege'] as privilege, ri.metadata['securable_type'] as securable_type, ri.metadata['securable_full_name'] as securable_name FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory ri JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v ON ri.resource_id = v.resource_id WHERE v.policy_id = 'POL-A002' AND v.status = 'open' AND ri.scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory) AND ri.resource_type = 'grant' LIMIT 30

datasets.name: ds_wd_dq
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN tags['dqm_enabled'] = 'true' AND tags['lhm_enabled'] = 'true' THEN 'Both' WHEN tags['dqm_enabled'] = 'true' THEN 'DQM Only' WHEN tags['lhm_enabled'] = 'true' THEN 'LHM Only' ELSE 'None' END as monitoring_status, COUNT(*) as table_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory WHERE scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory) AND resource_type = 'table' GROUP BY 1

datasets.name: ds_cross_violated_access
queryLines: SELECT v.resource_name as table_name, v.severity, v.policy_id, p.privilege_type, p.grantee FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v JOIN system.information_schema.table_privileges p ON v.resource_name = p.table_name WHERE v.status = 'open' AND v.severity IN ('critical','high') AND p.table_catalog NOT IN ('system','samples') ORDER BY v.severity, v.resource_name LIMIT 30

datasets.name: ds_cross_untagged_violations
queryLines: SELECT ri.resource_name, ri.owner, COUNT(DISTINCT v.violation_id) as open_violations, MAX(v.severity) as worst_severity FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory ri JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v ON ri.resource_id = v.resource_id AND v.status = 'open' LEFT JOIN system.information_schema.table_tags tt ON ri.resource_name = tt.table_name AND tt.catalog_name NOT IN ('system','samples') WHERE ri.scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory) AND ri.resource_type = 'table' AND tt.tag_name IS NULL GROUP BY ri.resource_name, ri.owner ORDER BY open_violations DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_ag_agent_kpis
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_agents, COUNT(CASE WHEN governance_status = 'governed' THEN 1 END) AS governed, COUNT(CASE WHEN governance_status = 'partially_governed' THEN 1 END) AS partially_governed, COUNT(CASE WHEN governance_status = 'ungoverned' THEN 1 END) AS ungoverned, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN governance_status = 'governed' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS governance_pct, SUM(open_violations) AS total_violations, SUM(critical_violations) AS critical_violations FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_inventory

datasets.name: ds_ag_agent_by_status
queryLines: SELECT governance_status, COUNT(*) AS agent_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_inventory GROUP BY governance_status

datasets.name: ds_ag_agent_by_source
queryLines: SELECT agent_source, COUNT(*) AS agent_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_inventory GROUP BY agent_source ORDER BY agent_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_risk_distribution
queryLines: SELECT risk_tier, COUNT(*) AS agent_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_risk_heatmap GROUP BY risk_tier ORDER BY CASE risk_tier WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

datasets.name: ds_ag_agent_violations
queryLines: SELECT v.severity, COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory ri ON v.resource_id = ri.resource_id WHERE v.status = 'open' AND ri.resource_type IN ('agent', 'agent_execution') AND ri.scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory) GROUP BY v.severity ORDER BY CASE v.severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

datasets.name: ds_ag_agent_inventory
queryLines: SELECT resource_name AS agent_name, agent_source, COALESCE(agent_owner, owner, 'unassigned') AS owner, governance_status, environment, open_violations, critical_violations, high_violations, CASE WHEN accessed_pii = 'true' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS pii_access, CASE WHEN used_external_tool = 'true' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS external_access, CASE WHEN exported_data = 'true' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS data_export FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_inventory ORDER BY CASE governance_status WHEN 'ungoverned' THEN 1 WHEN 'partially_governed' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, open_violations DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_top_violating_agents
queryLines: SELECT resource_name AS agent_name, open_violations, critical_violations, high_violations FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_inventory WHERE open_violations > 0 ORDER BY open_violations DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_ag_agent_policies
queryLines: SELECT v.policy_id, COALESCE(p.policy_name, v.policy_id) AS policy_name, v.severity, COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.policies p ON v.policy_id = p.policy_id WHERE v.status = 'open' AND v.policy_id LIKE 'POL-AGENT%' OR v.policy_id LIKE 'POL-EXEC%' GROUP BY v.policy_id, p.policy_name, v.severity ORDER BY violation_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_exec_kpis
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_executions, COUNT(CASE WHEN compliance_status = 'compliant' THEN 1 END) AS compliant, COUNT(CASE WHEN compliance_status != 'compliant' THEN 1 END) AS non_compliant, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN compliance_status = 'compliant' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS compliance_pct FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_execution_compliance

datasets.name: ds_ag_top_consumers
queryLines: SELECT endpoint_name, requester, request_count, total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, compliance_status, CASE WHEN accessed_pii = 'true' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS pii_access, open_violations FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_execution_compliance ORDER BY request_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_ag_pii_access
queryLines: SELECT endpoint_name, COUNT(*) AS execution_count, SUM(request_count) AS total_requests, SUM(total_input_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_execution_compliance WHERE accessed_pii = 'true' GROUP BY endpoint_name ORDER BY total_requests DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_ag_exec_by_endpoint
queryLines: SELECT endpoint_name, COUNT(*) AS total_executions, COUNT(CASE WHEN compliance_status = 'compliant' THEN 1 END) AS compliant, COUNT(CASE WHEN compliance_status != 'compliant' THEN 1 END) AS non_compliant FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_execution_compliance GROUP BY endpoint_name ORDER BY non_compliant DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_ag_error_rates
queryLines: SELECT endpoint_name, SUM(request_count) AS total_requests, SUM(error_count) AS total_errors, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(error_count) / NULLIF(SUM(request_count), 0), 2) AS error_rate_pct FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_execution_compliance WHERE error_count > 0 GROUP BY endpoint_name ORDER BY error_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_ag_risk_heatmap
queryLines: SELECT resource_name AS agent_name, agent_source, COALESCE(agent_owner, 'unassigned') AS owner, risk_tier, volume_tier, sensitivity_score, pii_access, external_access, data_export, total_requests, total_input_tokens, unique_requesters, total_errors, open_violations, critical_violations FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_risk_heatmap ORDER BY CASE risk_tier WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, total_requests DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_risk_tiers
queryLines: SELECT risk_tier, COUNT(*) AS agent_count FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_risk_heatmap GROUP BY risk_tier

datasets.name: ds_ag_sensitivity
queryLines: SELECT resource_name AS agent_name, pii_access, external_access, data_export, sensitivity_score FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_risk_heatmap WHERE sensitivity_score > 0 ORDER BY sensitivity_score DESC, total_requests DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_cross_agent_live_usage
datasets.displayName: Cross: Agent Violations + Live Endpoint Usage
queryLines: SELECT eu.served_entity_name AS endpoint_name, eu.request_metadata['request_type'] AS request_type, COUNT(*) AS request_count_7d, SUM(eu.usage_quantities['total_input_tokens']) AS live_input_tokens, SUM(eu.usage_quantities['total_output_tokens']) AS live_output_tokens, v.policy_id, v.severity, v.status AS violation_status FROM system.serving.endpoint_usage eu LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v ON v.resource_id LIKE concat('agent:%', eu.served_entity_name, '%') AND v.status = 'open' WHERE eu.request_date >= current_date() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS GROUP BY eu.served_entity_name, eu.request_metadata['request_type'], v.policy_id, v.severity, v.status ORDER BY request_count_7d DESC LIMIT 30

datasets.name: ds_cross_agent_ungoverned_active
datasets.displayName: Cross: Ungoverned Agents with Active Traffic
queryLines: SELECT eu.served_entity_name AS endpoint_name, COUNT(*) AS requests_7d, SUM(eu.usage_quantities['total_input_tokens']) AS input_tokens_7d, ri.tags['agent_owner'] AS agent_owner, ri.tags['audit_logging_enabled'] AS audit_logging, COUNT(DISTINCT v.policy_id) AS open_policy_violations FROM system.serving.endpoint_usage eu JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory ri ON ri.resource_name = eu.served_entity_name AND ri.resource_type = 'agent' AND ri.scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory) LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v ON ri.resource_id = v.resource_id AND v.status = 'open' WHERE eu.request_date >= current_date() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS AND (ri.tags['agent_owner'] IS NULL OR ri.tags['audit_logging_enabled'] IS NULL OR ri.tags['audit_logging_enabled'] != 'true') GROUP BY eu.served_entity_name, ri.tags['agent_owner'], ri.tags['audit_logging_enabled'] ORDER BY requests_7d DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_cross_agent_pii_live
datasets.displayName: Cross: PII-Flagged Agents — Live Token Consumption
queryLines: SELECT eu.served_entity_name AS endpoint_name, SUM(eu.usage_quantities['total_input_tokens']) AS live_input_tokens_7d, SUM(eu.usage_quantities['total_output_tokens']) AS live_output_tokens_7d, COUNT(*) AS live_requests_7d, ri.tags['accessed_pii'] AS pii_flag, ri.tags['exported_data'] AS export_flag, COUNT(DISTINCT v.policy_id) AS open_violations FROM system.serving.endpoint_usage eu JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory ri ON ri.resource_name = eu.served_entity_name AND ri.resource_type = 'agent' AND ri.scan_id = (SELECT MAX(scan_id) FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.resource_inventory) LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.violations v ON ri.resource_id = v.resource_id AND v.status = 'open' WHERE eu.request_date >= current_date() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS AND ri.tags['accessed_pii'] = 'true' GROUP BY eu.served_entity_name, ri.tags['accessed_pii'], ri.tags['exported_data'] ORDER BY live_input_tokens_7d DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_remediation_priorities
queryLines: SELECT policy_id, policy_name, severity, domain, remediation_steps, why_it_matters, total_violations, affected_resources, customer_agent_violations, affected_customer_agents, affected_owners, oldest_days_open, priority_score, effort_estimate FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_remediation_priorities WHERE customer_agent_violations > 0 ORDER BY priority_score DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_remediation_all
queryLines: SELECT policy_id, policy_name, severity, total_violations, customer_agent_violations, managed_endpoint_violations, priority_score, effort_estimate FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_remediation_priorities ORDER BY priority_score DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_quick_wins
queryLines: SELECT policy_id, policy_name, severity, customer_agent_violations AS fixes, effort_estimate, remediation_steps FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_remediation_priorities WHERE effort_estimate LIKE 'low%' AND customer_agent_violations > 0 ORDER BY customer_agent_violations DESC

datasets.name: ds_ag_remediation_by_effort
queryLines: SELECT effort_estimate, SUM(customer_agent_violations) AS violations FROM serverless_stable_s0v155_catalog.watchdog.v_agent_remediation_priorities WHERE customer_agent_violations > 0 GROUP BY effort_estimate ORDER BY CASE WHEN effort_estimate LIKE 'low%' THEN 1 WHEN effort_estimate LIKE 'medium%' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

lines: Unified view: UC metadata health (system tables) + policy compliance posture (Watchdog)
UC native tag coverage + Watchdog classification posture

frame.title: UC: Undocumented Tables (no tags, no comments)
Watchdog + UC: Untagged Tables WITH Violations

lines: UC privilege distribution + Watchdog access governance violations

frame.title: Who Has Access to High/Critical Violated Resources?

lines: Who owns the most violations — and across how many policies and domains?
Governance posture across deployed AI agents and their execution traces
All discovered agents with governance status, data access flags, and violations
Agent execution traces — request volumes, token usage, PII access, and compliance status
### Live System Table Cross-Join: system.serving.endpoint_usage × Watchdog Violations

frame.title: Live Endpoint Usage × Watchdog Violations (7 days)

lines: Agent risk scoring: data sensitivity (PII, external, export) × request volume
Prioritized by impact (severity × affected customer agents). FMAPI endpoints excluded — they're Databricks-managed.

frame.title: Quick Wins — Low Effort, High Impact
Prioritized Remediation Actions — Do These First
All Violations — Customer vs FMAPI Breakdown
